svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="page1" name="Function Call Tree"> <mxGraphModel dx="1331" dy="845" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#999999;" value="Oval = Function, Arrow = calls" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="400" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_main" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1565C0;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="main" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="420" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_register" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#42A5F5;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;" value="screen_register" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="80" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_main_reg" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_main" target="n_register"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_login" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#42A5F5;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;" value="screen_login" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="110" x="250" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_main_log" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_main" target="n_login"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_forgot" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#42A5F5;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;" value="screen_forgot_password" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="410" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_main_fgt" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_main" target="n_forgot"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_list" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#42A5F5;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;" value="screen_list_users" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="600" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_main_lst" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_main" target="n_list"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_exit" parent="1" <mxCell id="e_main_ext" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_main" target="n_exit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h_auth" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2E7D32;" value="- auth.py -" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="380" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_reg_regfn" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_register" target="n_reg_fn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_log_fn" parent="1" id="e_log_logfn" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_login" target="n_log_fn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_fgt_fn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#FF9800;fontSize=10;fontColor=#E65100;" value="Project files:
main.py (UI layer)
auth.py (business logic)
database.py (persistence)
utils.py (validation)
models.py (data model)
data/ (SQLite DB)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="160" x="50" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

main.py (UI layer)
auth.py (business logic)
database.py (persistence)
utils.py (validation)
models.py (data model)
data/ (SQLite DB)
